title: High Court (Remuneration of Commercial Court Assessors) Notice, 2001
title_en: High Court (Remuneration of Commercial Court Assessors) Notice, 2001

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the High Court (Remuneration of Commercial Court Assessors) Notice.

provisions.title: Entitlement
provisions.content: Every assessor of the High Court (Commercial Division) who attends a session pursuant to Rule 5C of the High Court Registries (Amendment) Rules 1 , shall be entitled to a sum of forty thousand shillings for each whole day or part of the day he is in attandance at such court. 1 G.N.
